title: MTT assay on 96 well plate
steps: Observe cell on the plate, make a note about cells condition
Experiment by make a serial dilution sample in U-Type, suspend 40 times
Put 100 μl/well sample and DMSO, incubate 48 h, 37 oC
Observe condition cells after 48 h incubation
Checked toxicity under microscope, take photo if there are morphology changing
Put 150 μl/well by multichannel pipet, incubate 4 h, 37 oC
Remove MTT solution from well plate
Check absorbance at 560 nm and 750 nm , shaker 0.5 min before read absorbance
creator: Adita Ayu Permanasari
